rows.label: tev001392_MSG0001
rows.name: Good day to you, [ST:playername ].[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0002
rows.name:
Rock and I were just
relaxing here at the park.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0003
rows.name:
Whilst there is little greenery, it is
still enough to help calm my nerves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0004
rows.name:
My home planet was a lush and verdant
place that was full of trees.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0005
rows.name:
I suppose being here reminds
me of home, if only a little.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0006
rows.name:
Tell me about this Earth from which
your people hail. What was it like?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_JNK0010
rows.name: Speak of Images

rows.label: tev001392_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say that you've seen pictures of
both gorgeous natural areas and
impressive industrial ones.

rows.label: tev001392_JNK0020
rows.name: Speak of History

rows.label: tev001392_SEL0021
rows.name:
Say you've read that its natural
beauty was gradually destroyed
by industry and greed.

rows.label: tev001392_JNK0030
rows.name: Speak of Facts

rows.label: tev001392_SEL0031
rows.name:
Explain that its surface was 30
percent land and 70 percent water.

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0007
rows.name:
Interesting. It sounds very much
like Primordial Wilderness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0008
rows.name:
After all, Primordial Wilderness
is lush and green, but also has
a large city built upon it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0009
rows.name:
If nature and industry were able
to coexist on Earth, it must
have been a wonderful planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0010
rows.name:
If it were somehow possible for me to
visit, I'd love to go and see its sights.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0011
rows.name:
Although I worry that Rock
wouldn't have a place to sleep.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0012
rows.name: I see. How terribly sad.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0013
rows.name:
We all live upon planets, and are a
part of the natural order they host.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0014
rows.name:
Destroying the planet upon which one lives
is tantamount to destroying oneself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0015
rows.name:
Is it any different from destroying
a bridge while you are yet walking
across it? I think not.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0016
rows.name:
Perhaps there were circumstances that
made such destruction unavoidable?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0017
rows.name:
...No. Forgive me. Nothing good can
come of struggling for justifications.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0018
rows.name:
Instead, let us strive to take
better care of THIS world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0019
rows.name: Is that right? Fascinating![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0020
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0021
rows.name: Um...is that all you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0022
rows.name:
Well, I suppose that is enough
for me to visualize Earth
in...rather broad strokes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0023
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0024
rows.name:
With that much water, for example, one
would imagine Earth was quite blue![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0025
rows.name:
Maybe some lush, green land here
and there. Probably a few rocks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0026
rows.name:
The character of its inhabitants
suggests a world rich in nature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0027
rows.name:
For example, I could see the Bias coming
from a harsh world on which seeds could
find no purchase, but not humanity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev001392_MSG0028
rows.name:
I do not know if these conjectures
are correct, but the image I have
of Earth is quite lovely.[ST:wait ]
